checks.name: release-validation-script
checks.detail: Local release validation now checks every workspace package version, CHANGELOG.md, and docs/releases/<version>.md before publication.

checks.name: github-release-workflow
checks.detail: The new Release workflow runs only from the latest default-branch HEAD, blocks duplicate tags/releases, reruns typecheck/test/build, and creates the tag plus GitHub Release through gh.

checks.name: tree-cleanup
checks.detail: Removed only generated .turbo/dist trees; retained tracked proof bundles because they are canonical repo history.
